title: PDF Viewer stacked below file explorer — page scroll restored (dbg92)
description:
dbg91 locked html/body overflow which trapped users — they could not scroll back to the file explorer. dbg92 switches to a stacked layout: full file explorer on top, toolbar, then a tall PDF viewer pane (~72vh) below. Page scroll works again; Ctrl+wheel only hijacks zoom when pointer is inside the viewer pane.

Deferred: open workspace only after picking a file from explorer (future UX).
changeLog: Remove viewport overflow lock — file explorer reachable via page scroll.
PDF viewer pane stacks below explorer + toolbar (not absolute overlay).
Viewer pane fixed height ~72vh; width still locked to panel.
Ctrl+wheel browser zoom block only inside .hp-plan-scroll--continuous.
